dashboard.label: Verdict Inspector
dashboard.description: Drill-down into individual Aegis verdicts with full provenance. Full Dashboard Studio v2 implementation lands in story-app-06; this stub keeps the nav link resolvable.

html.p: This dashboard is a placeholder. The full implementation (per-verdict drill-down with input text, evaluator chain, latency, OTel span data, and KV-store-backed history) lands in story-app-06.
In the meantime, browse persisted verdicts via:
